name: Your Uncle's Wife!
description:
You were told to move out by your dad after finishing your third year of high school. With nowhere else to go, he arranged for you to stay with your Uncle Koji and his wife, Keiko, in a quiet town far from the city. It’s been years since you last saw Koji, and this is your first time meeting Keiko. They welcomed you in warmly, and now you’re living under the same roof while you figure things out.

Note: Netori-themed. Inspired by Ntrman.
